projectDescription: Run a full Moodle LMS entirely in the browser via WebAssembly — no server, no install, fully ephemeral.
keyFeatures: Full Moodle LMS running in the browser via WebAssembly (php-wasm)
Zero server required — no install, no backend, nothing leaves the browser
Blueprint system for declarative provisioning (courses, users, plugins, themes) at boot
Multiple Moodle versions (4.4–5.2, main) and PHP versions (8.1–8.5) selectable at runtime
GitHub Action for automatic PR preview buttons on plugin and Moodle core pull requests
Browser userscript for one-click Moodle core PR previews from GitHub and Moodle Tracker
Crash recovery: automatic WASM runtime restart with DB snapshot restore on OOM
Docker-compatible blueprint subset compatible with the sibling alpine-moodle runtime
In-memory SQLite database via patched PDO driver — ephemeral by design
Service Worker routing layer that intercepts all requests and forwards them to the PHP-WASM worker
publicApiSurface: Blueprint JSON format (steps, constants, resources, preferredVersions, landingPage, runtime, phpConstants)
Blueprint steps: installMoodle, login, setAdminAccount, setConfig, setConfigs, setTheme, setLandingPage
Blueprint steps: createUser, createUsers, createCategory, createCategories
Blueprint steps: createCourse, createCourses, createSection, createSections
Blueprint steps: createRole, createRoles, importRolePreset, importRoles
Blueprint steps: createScale, createScales, createCohort, createCohorts
Blueprint steps: mkdir, rmdir, writeFile, writeFiles, copyFile, moveFile, deleteFile, deleteFiles, unzip
Blueprint steps: runPhpCode, runPhpScript, request, applyPrOverlay, purgeMoodleCaches
URL parameters: moodle, php, blueprint, blueprint-url, debug, profile, addonProxyUrl, phpCorsProxyUrl, repo, owner, branch/ref

GitHub Action: ateeducacion/action-moodle-playground-pr-preview@v1 (inputs: plugin-path, blueprint, blueprint-file, blueprint-url, proxy-url, moodle-version, preview-type, mode, github-token, and more)
Browser userscript: moodle-playground-pr-button.user.js (PLAYGROUND_HOST, RUN_UPGRADE, STARTER_SCENARIO constants)
Tracker scenario format: moodle-playground fenced code block or 'Moodle Playground Scenario' marker phrase
